sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id INT, map_col MAP<STRING, INT>);
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, MAP {'key1': 10, 'key2': 20}), (2, MAP {'key3': 30, 'key4': 40});
UPDATE test_map SET map_col = MAP {'key1': 50, 'key2': 60} WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_map WHERE map_contains_value(map_col, 20);
